finding_results.notes: Separated pressure cadence by speaker: Hyejin now delivers task-first advice through concrete neighborhood anecdote, Ina runs qualifier-then-correction stress speech, and Dohyun pivots from sparse warning to confessional memory via a short declarative trigger line.

summary: Updated the dinner-pressure exchange to reinforce idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, and anti-transcript rhythm while preserving continuity beats and chapter-level consequences.
